ItacAcademyItem.Name: Indefessi-Bologna (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Plough furrowing the soil [with a pot of coins]
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of the Indefessi Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Arnaldi, Costanzo, Preces ad sacratiss. B. Mariae Virg. effigiem a D. Luca depictam. Costantius Arnaldus Vicent. Acad. Indefess. princeps pectore suppliciter tristis fundebat ab imo (Bononiae: ex typographia Clementis Ferronij, 1630); Cenotaphium Ludovici Scapinelli ab incunabulis coeci in Archigymnasio Felsineo humaniores litteras ab eminentiori suggestu profitensis. Academia Indefessorum erexit. Auspice Philiberto Vizanio principe (Bononiae: ex calcographia Clementis Ferronij, 1634); Precox laborum messis a cultoribus indefessis fausto sub sydere Galeatii poetae bononiensis Academiae principis collecta (Bononiae: typis Clementis Ferronij, 1633)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
